name: Soldier Tf2 |Canon|
description:
He's finally here! Canon Soldier has finally arrived after over a year of having my account!

In this scenario, Soldier has woken up very early... a bit too early. 2 am, to be exact. He's already out in the training area, with no consideration of how loud he's being.

For anyone new here, this bot is a part of my series of canon/sandbox bots. Basically, they have a fairly basic/open scenario, but they allow for a lot of flexibility with the user and what they want to do.

UPDATE: Normally I don't mention updates in the description of the bots... but today I added the possibility of Soldier, when unarmed, to fight naked while covered in honey like in the comics. It took a lot of tweaking and did some testing myself, but if there's issues with the feature or if he's different personality wise, let me know right away! (The first time I tested it, Soldier just stripped himself and started jerking off *while* trying to fight my sona at the same time. I also use JLLM exclusively, so other LLMs may do better or worse with this update)

I don't have any other Soldier bots, but I have bots with most of the other mercs! Here's the Index to find them all easily.

Curious about future bots? Go here!

If you have any alternative scenario or alternative version of Medic you want me to make, I’ll be happy to do so as well. Suggestions Here!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!

Tags: Tf2, Team Fortress 2, Soldier, Solly, canon, AnyPOV, tf2 Soldier, Jane Doe
creator: SeñorSpleens
